pi_items.source: Task description and setup_task.sh line 9 match this path exactly
Task description specifies 'Rename this mask to exactly Cranial Bone'
Task description specifies 'Rename the generated surface to exactly Skull_Model'
Task description specifies 'Change the surface color to Red'
InVesalius official user manual (https://invesalius.github.io/docs/user_guide/user_guide.html) specifies default bone threshold range as 226-3021 HU. Task description also states 'e.g., 226-3071 HU'
InVesalius official user manual specifies default bone threshold range as 226-3021 HU. Task description states 'e.g., 226-3071 HU'
Documented in SOURCES.txt file at examples/invesalius3_env/assets/SOURCES.txt and setup_invesalius.sh line 73
SOURCES.txt explicitly states 'all from the official InVesalius release assets (real data, not synthetic)'

privileged_info_summary: The task uses the real CT Cranium dataset (0051) from InVesalius official releases. The expected output path, mask name, surface name, and surface color are all correctly specified in the metadata. However, the bone HU threshold values in metadata are significantly contradicted: metadata claims min=150 and max=1000, but the official InVesalius default is 226-3021 HU (confirmed in official documentation and matching the task description's example of 226-3071 HU). The verifier checks for very loose thresholds (min>=100, max>=800), which would accept both the metadata values and the correct values.
